stem:
Rydra Wong, the protagonist of Samuel R. Delany’s 1966 novel Babel-17, is a poet, an occupation which, in Delany’s work, is not _______: nearly a dozen of the characters that populate his novels are poets or writers.

Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
explanation: “Atypical” means uncommon. Because nearly a dozen of Delany’s characters are poets or writers, being a poet is clearly not an unusual occupation in his fiction. Whether the occupation is faultless, profitable, or boring is not what the many-poet-characters detail supports.
